title: MEDIOMICS
subtitle: AI-Powered Health Analysis
heroDesc: Get personalized dietary recommendations, home remedies, and wellness insights powered by advanced symptom analysis.

validation.profileRequired: Please fill out all profile fields.

status.analyzingDesc: Our AI is processing your symptoms and generating personalized recommendations...
status.completeDesc: Here are your personalized health recommendations, {{name}}

sections.recFoodsDesc: Nutritious foods to support your recovery
sections.homeRemediesDesc: Natural solutions you can try at home
sections.posMedicinesDesc: OTC options — consult a doctor first
sections.medWarning: These are general suggestions. Always consult a healthcare professional before taking any medication.
sections.healthTipDesc: Regular health check-ups can catch potential issues early. Consider booking a comprehensive health screening every 6-12 months.
sections.disclaimerDesc: This app provides general health information and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment.
